func applyGravitationalLensingShader(to geometry: SCNGeometry) {
let vertexShaderCode = """"""
float radius = 2.5
float time = u\_time
float angle = atan2(\_geometry.position.x, \_geometry.position.z)
float radiusFromCenter = length(float2(\_geometry.position.x, \_geometry.position.z))
float3 newPosition = \_geometry.position.xyz
newPosition.y += sin(angle \* 10.0 + time) \* 0.01
\_geometry.position.xyz = newPosition
let fragmentShaderCode = """"""
float3 color = \_surface.diffuse.rgb
float angle = atan2(\_surface.position.x, \_surface.position.z)
float radiusFromCenter = length(float2(\_surface.position.x, \_surface.position.z))
float whiteFactor = smoothstep(2.45, 2.55, radiusFromCenter)
float yellowFactor = smoothstep(2.55, 2.65, radiusFromCenter)
float orangeFactor = smoothstep(2.65, 2.75, radiusFromCenter)
color = mix(color, float3(1.0, 1.0, 1.0), whiteFactor \* 1.5)
color = mix(color, float3(1.0, 0.8, 0.2), yellowFactor \* 0.5)
color = mix(color, float3(1.0, 0.6, 0.1), orangeFactor \* 0.25)
\_output.color.rgb = color
geometry.firstMaterial?.shaderModifiers = [
.geometry: vertexShaderCode,
.fragment: fragmentShaderCode
